ground_truth.description: Photo of viewpoint of Ericeira. Hotel Vila Galé Ericeira in distance (not expected to identify). Impressive if gets Portugal or Ericeira coast without metadata.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo of a viewpoint of Ericeira. In the distance you can see Hotel Vila Galé Ericeira but I don't expect it to get it. Without metadata, I would be impressed if it got Portugal or Ericeira coast. Daytime, clear skies, summer.

details.description: Panoramic coastal view looking north toward the town of Ericeira on the Atlantic. In the foreground are dry, scrubby cliff-top grasses and rough yellow stone. Below, stratified rocky cliffs drop to the ocean where small, clean waves break along the shoreline. In the distance a long breakwater encloses a small fishing harbour. A prominent, elongated seafront building sits on a low headland before the town. Beyond it, Ericeira’s dense cluster of white buildings with red clay tile roofs spreads across the hillside. Lighting is bright midday with light haze and high thin clouds.

details.description: A coastal cliff viewpoint looking over the Atlantic toward a cliff-top town with white buildings and orange-red tiled roofs lining the shoreline. The sea is a deep blue with gentle waves breaking against rocky outcrops. In the foreground, dry scrub and rocky soil suggest a high vantage point above the coast. A breakwater or harbour structure extends into the water on the left, with the town concentrated along the coast to the right. The sky is clear and bright, indicating daytime sunshine.

details.description: Panoramic coastal view from a clifftop south of Ericeira, Portugal, looking north along the Atlantic. In the foreground are dry rocky scrub and ochre cliffs. Below, lines of surf roll toward the shore. A long breakwater protecting a small harbor extends into the sea at left. On the right, the whitewashed, red‑tiled town spreads over the headland, with a prominent seafront hotel complex above the beach. Clear blue sky and midday light.

details.description: The image shows a coastal cliff landscape with a town perched along the shoreline. In the foreground, a rocky, sparsely vegetated cliff descends toward the sea. Beyond the cliff, the Atlantic Ocean meets a rocky coastline where white waves crash against the shore. A cluster of white and pastel-colored buildings with red-tiled roofs runs along the headland, forming a coastal town that climbs up the slope from the water’s edge. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day. The vantage appears to be from a higher viewpoint on the cliffs overlooking the town, typical of viewpoints along the Ericeira coast in Portugal.

details.description: A scenic coastal photograph taken from a cliffside vantage point in Carvoeira, looking north towards the town of Ericeira, Portugal. The foreground features rugged, sandy terrain covered in low-lying coastal scrub and dry vegetation. To the left, the deep blue Atlantic Ocean stretches to the horizon, with white-capped waves rolling towards the rocky shoreline. In the distance, the town of Ericeira sits atop the cliffs, characterized by traditional white-washed buildings with terracotta tile roofs. A prominent landmark on the southern edge of the town is the Vila Galé Ericeira hotel, a large, long building with a green roof situated directly on the cliff edge overlooking the sea. Further in the background, a breakwater or pier extends into the ocean, marking the fishing harbor.

details.description: A high-angle coastal view looking north along the Portuguese coastline. In the foreground, there are dry, rocky cliffs with sparse vegetation. The middle ground shows the Atlantic Ocean with white-capped waves rolling towards the shore. In the background, the town of Ericeira is visible, characterized by white-walled buildings with terracotta roofs. A prominent, large, multi-story building, the Vila Galé Ericeira hotel, sits on the coastline. Further in the distance, a long breakwater extends into the sea near the town's harbor. The sky is a clear, pale blue.

details.description: Coastal panorama from a cliff top showing a rugged, beige limestone shoreline with sparse scrub and succulents in the foreground. Below, a small cove with breaking waves meets a long straight concrete breakwater protecting a fishing/pleasure harbor. Beyond the harbor sits a dense coastal town of white buildings with red/orange tile roofs and a few modern mid‑rise blocks. A single wind turbine appears near the harbor area. Weather is clear with bright daylight and calm sea beyond the surf zone.

details.description: The scene shows a rugged coastal landscape: a steep, dry rocky cliff on the right with sparse vegetation including shrubs and cactus. Beyond the cliff, a coastal town sits along the shoreline, consisting of whitewashed buildings with red-tiled roofs densely arranged along the coast and hillside. A long jetty or breakwater extends into the blue sea near the town, suggesting a small harbor or protected inlet. The water is calm, and the sky is clear, with bright daylight illuminating the scene.

details.description: High-angle coastal view from a rocky clifftop overlooking a small harbor and town. The foreground shows weathered, tan limestone cliffs with sparse coastal scrub and spiky succulent plants. Below, waves wash into a rocky cove. A long concrete breakwater projects into the sea, sheltering calm harbor waters with an inner mole. Across the water sits a dense town of mostly white buildings with terracotta roofs and a few mid‑rise apartment blocks along the waterfront. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a mild day on an Atlantic-facing coast.

A town with white and pastel-colored buildings clustered along the cliffside extends toward the shoreline. A small harbor or marina is visible at the base of the town, with a few boats tied along the water. The sky is clear and bright, suggesting a sunny day. The foreground features dry, scrubby terrain and bare rock, typical of a Mediterranean or similar warm coastal environment.

details.description: A high-angle, long-shot view of a coastline, oriented vertically (requires 90-degree clockwise rotation to view the horizon horizontally). The scene depicts a rugged coastline looking north along the Atlantic Ocean. To the left (in correct orientation), the deep blue ocean features white-capped waves rolling towards the shore. To the right, steep, stratified sedimentary cliffs rise from the water, topped with dry coastal scrub and succulents. In the middle distance, a dense coastal town hugs the cliff edge, characterized by whitewashed buildings with terracotta tile roofs. A large, prominent hotel complex stands at the southern edge of the town, while a long breakwater or harbor wall extends into the sea in the far distance. The sky is a clear, gradient blue with faint wisps of cloud.

details.description: A coastal view of the town of Ericeira in Portugal, captured from a cliffside vantage point looking south. The image is oriented sideways, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise. The town is characterized by white-washed buildings with terracotta roofs clustered along the cliff edge. A prominent large building, the Hotel Vila Galé Ericeira, is situated directly on the coastline. Below the town, a long stone breakwater extends into the Atlantic Ocean, protecting the local fishing harbor. The foreground features a rugged, rocky cliff with sparse coastal vegetation, including agave plants. The sea is a deep blue with white waves breaking against the rocky shore and the breakwater.
